title: Weak signals and trend analysis: horizon scanning
body: "This case study showcases work delivered by Andthen, commissioned by the Department for the Environment, Food and Rural Affairs Futures team in 2024-2025, as part of a broader initiative to develop a horizon scanning capability at Defra. One of the project outputs, Defra’s 2024 Megatrends, is available on Defra’s science search.  Read other futures tools and methods case studies.  "
